reviews.comment:
ATENCIÓN ACA (PARECE QUE HACEN UN FAVOR) Y EL ACCESORIOS TODO DESTRUIDO, CREO LO TIENEN ASÍ A PROPÓSITO PARA QUE VAYAN A LA ESTACIÓN DE AL LADO EL PERSONAL NO TIENE INCENTIVO O NO LES IMPORTA TENER MAS CLIENTES Y CREO QUE AL ACA TAMPOCO!!

(Translated by Google)
ATTENTION HERE (IT SEEMS THEY'RE DOING YOU A FAVOR) AND THE ACCESSORIES ARE ALL DESTROYED, I THINK THEY HAVE IT LIKE THAT ON PURPOSE SO YOU GO TO THE STATION NEXT DOOR. THE STAFF HAS NO INCENTIVE OR THEY DON'T CARE ABOUT HAVING MORE CUSTOMERS AND I THINK THEY DON'T EITHER HERE!!
